autor: we just don't want to be in a situation where we need one. You can't have one without the other. Sometimes what we perceive as our problem is really God setting us up to do something miraculous in our lives. It's about training ourselves to see those problems as opportunities so God can intervene.
explicacao: Citação de we just don't want to be in a situation where we need one. You can't have one without the other. Sometimes what we perceive as our problem is really God setting us up to do something miraculous in our lives. It's about training ourselves to see those problems as opportunities so God can intervene. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Everybody wants a miracle” articula reflexao, mark-batterson, everybody em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
